examples: Wilma Subra had no intention of becoming a public speaker.
The old Wilma Theatre is a funky, lovely, ornate riverside venue.
You have one rule invoking another rule and then you can get a sentence like "Fred thinks Barney likes Wilma".
United used to use Wilma, but dropped it to help smooth the Continental merger.
Wilma, the last Category 3 or stronger storm, occurred more than seven years ago.
